title: TMDB Movie Scores — Valence, Emotion & VAD
subtitle: 1.17M movies with aggregated keyword valence, emotion intensity & VAD
description:
## TMDB Movie Scores — Valence, Emotion & VAD

One row per TMDB movie. Keyword-level lexicon scores (NRC Emotion, NRC Emotion Intensity, NRC VAD, SCL-OPP) are aggregated to the movie level by taking the mean across all scored keywords.

## Pipeline

```
tmdb-movies-clean (1.17M movies)
  → explode keywords
  → join tmdb-keyword-lexicon (NRC Emotion + VAD + SCL)
  → aggregate per movie (mean across keywords)
```

## Column prefix convention

| Prefix | Source |
|--------|--------|
| `emolex_` | NRC Emotion Lexicon (binary membership) |
| `intensity_` | NRC Emotion Intensity Lexicon (0–1 continuous) |
| `vad_` | NRC VAD Lexicon v2.1 (valence/arousal/dominance, −1 to +1) |
| `scl_` | SCL-OPP / SCL-NMA (phrase composition) |
| `movie_` | Movie-level aggregate of keyword scores |

## Key columns

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `movie_sentiment` | Derived label: positive / neutral / negative (from movie_valence) |
| `movie_valence` | Primary valence score — mean keyword_valence across all scored keywords |
| `movie_vad_valence` | Mean NRC VAD valence (−1 to +1) |
| `movie_vad_arousal` | Mean NRC VAD arousal (−1 to +1) |
| `movie_vad_dominance` | Mean NRC VAD dominance (−1 to +1) |
| `movie_intensity_*` | Mean NRC Emotion Intensity per emotion (8 emotions) |
| `movie_scl_shift` | Mean SCL composition shift (phrase vs token valence divergence) |
| `movie_scl_coverage` | Fraction of keywords found in SCL lexicon |
| `quality` | Entry quality: real_confident, real_likely, stub_legitimate, stub_uncertain, spam_likely, spam_confident |
| `theatrical` | True = theatrical/streaming release (TMDB video=False) |

## Related datasets

- [TMDB Movies — Clean & Current](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/bdelanghe/tmdb-movies-clean) — source movie corpus
- [TMDB Keyword Lexicon](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/bdelanghe/tmdb-keyword-lexicon) — keyword-level scores
- [TMDB Movie Keywords Exploded](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/bdelanghe/tmdb-movie-keywords-exploded) — one row per (movie, keyword)

## Source

https://github.com/bdelanghe/imdb-kaggle

Lexicons by Saif M. Mohammad (NRC Canada): NRC Emotion Lexicon, NRC Emotion Intensity Lexicon, NRC VAD Lexicon v2.1, SCL-OPP, SCL-NMA.

resources.description: One row per TMDB movie — aggregated keyword valence, emotion intensity, VAD, and SCL scores

fields.name: quality
fields.description: Entry quality label: real_confident, real_likely, stub_legitimate, stub_uncertain, spam_likely, spam_confident

fields.name: theatrical
fields.description: True = theatrical/streaming release; False = video/bonus (from TMDB daily export video flag)

fields.name: movie_sentiment
fields.description: Derived sentiment label: positive (>0.05), neutral (−0.05 to 0.05), negative (<−0.05)

fields.name: movie_valence
fields.description: Mean keyword_valence across all scored keywords — best available valence per keyword (SCL overrides VAD)

fields.name: movie_scl_shift
fields.description: Mean SCL composition shift (phrase vs token divergence)

fields.name: movie_scl_coverage
fields.description: Fraction of keywords found in SCL lexicon
